metadata.title: MaaEnd - Endfield Assistant
metadata.description: Advanced AI automation assistant for "Arknights: Endfield". Intelligent, Efficient, Cross-platform.

hero.title: MaaEnd
hero.subtitle: MAA - End
hero.tagline: "Arknights: Endfield" Automated Assistant Tool Powered by Visual Recognition

realTimeTask.title: Real-time Assist
realTimeTask.detail: Auto story, interaction handling, combat assist, auto pickup, teleport confirmations, auto zipline — plus quick puzzle solving and pat support, powered by real-time screen recognition~ 🎮

puzzleSolver.title: Puzzle Solver
puzzleSolver.detail: AI solves puzzles instantly — no more scratching your head! Supports single/loop/demo modes 😎

essenceFilter.title: Essence Filter
essenceFilter.detail: Intelligently recognizes essence attributes, auto-filters and keeps the best stats — trash cleared in one click, no more manual checking! 💎

blueprints.title: Blueprint Importer
blueprints.detail: Batch import blueprints with smart parsing (share codes or messy text) — build your industrial empire with max efficiency! 📐

dailyRewards.title: Daily Automation
dailyRewards.detail: Base collection/restock/clues, daily rewards (missions/pass/mail), simulation rewards, delivery jobs/commission grabbing, friend visits, wiki/manual cleanup, Baker chats — plus product exchanges, credit shopping, item transfers, batch crafting... all done in one click! ✅

crossPlatform.title: Cross Platform
crossPlatform.detail: PC + Android fully supported — enjoy the game on any platform! 🐟

about.paragraph1: MaaEnd is more than a simple script. Built on MaaFramework’s “black-box automation” capabilities, it forms a closed loop of screenshot capture → visual recognition → branching decisions → action execution. Without reading any in-game/internal data, it hands repetitive tasks over to the program.
about.paragraph2: Whether you’re on PC or Android/emulators, MaaEnd runs tasks with the same logic to minimize platform-specific hassle. With auto-updates and continuous iteration, you can spend your time in the game—not in configuration.

footer.marquee: LET'S AUTOMATE THE FUTURE OF ARKNIGHTS: ENDFIELD
footer.description: An advanced AI automation assistant for Endfield. Open source, secure, and highly efficient.
footer.copyright: MaaEnd TEAM. OPEN SOURCE UNDER AGPL-3.0.
footer.designGoalNote: The webpage content reflects the product design goals; AI priority refers to the module/project name.
